completed.title: Bootstrap package skeleton, docs scaffold, and dashboard
completed.summary: Created the child repo, package metadata, operator docs, and initial dashboard/status model.

completed.title: Extract shared runtime core
completed.summary: Added shared path, platform, runtime-policy, worker-client, and lifecycle helpers under core/.

completed.title: Add shared agent-driven fallback commands
completed.summary: Added shared session-start, observe, stop, and session-end command entrypoints plus tests.

completed.title: Migrate Codex hooks onto the shared core
completed.summary: Moved Codex provider metadata and hook wrappers onto the shared lifecycle helpers.

completed.title: Build shared installer utilities and Codex installers
completed.summary: Added reusable installer helpers plus Codex install and uninstall flows with runtime-mode-aware hook handling.

completed.title: Create the shared claude-mem skill
completed.summary: Replaced the Codex-only skill with a shared cross-CLI claude-mem skill and validation tests.

completed.title: Write complete package docs
completed.summary: Realigned README, package docs, execution status, and dashboard fallback snapshot with the implemented Codex installer surface.

completed.title: Add Claude and Copilot adapters and installers
completed.summary: Implemented the Claude and Copilot provider slices, installer and uninstall flows, package scripts, and regression tests with parallel workers.

completed.title: Verify Codex parity and remove legacy codex-mem
completed.summary: Closed the remaining parity gaps, added Codex compatibility aliasing and prerequisite validation, and removed the legacy parent-workspace codex-mem directory.

spawnedAgents.responsibility: implemented adapters/claude and installers/claude with tests
implemented adapters/copilot and installers/copilot with tests
compared legacy codex-mem behavior against claude-mem-plugin before deletion
verified parent-workspace references and deletion safety before removing codex-mem
